headline: 今日娱乐：痴迷领跑，末日地堡热度不减
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》与《末日地堡》持续霸榜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》等新片本周将映。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' and 'Silo' continue to dominate, with 'Enola Holmes 3' and others arriving this week.

industryHighlights.text: 本周新片《穿普拉达的女王2》备受期待
industryHighlights.en: This week's new film 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' highly anticipated

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》与《玩具总动员5》同时上榜本周趋势
industryHighlights.en: 'Supergirl' and 'Toy Story 5' both trending this week

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》等大片即将上映，暑期档升温
industryHighlights.en: Blockbusters like 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' coming soon, heating up summer box office

industryHighlights.text: 《鬼玩人6：燃烧》定档，恐怖片迷期待
industryHighlights.en: 'Evil Dead 6: Burn' set for release, horror fans excited
